lines: France, Norway, AND Argentina all won last night — meaning Callum is sitting pretty on 16 points like the smug cunt he absolutely is, while Dene watches his Senegal side get battered 3-2 and slide to zero points. Dene mate, your group stage is basically a wake.
Ellis is quietly being a sneaky bitch about this whole thing — Argentina cruising, Algeria nicking a win, and she's up to 13 points without anyone really noticing. Watch her.

Today's absolute chaos merchant fixture is Colombia vs DR Congo, which is essentially Carter vs Carter AND Butters, a man so hedged he's practically a garden centre — someone's getting fucked either way and it's brilliant.

Portugal vs Uzbekistan is Butters' big chance to get Ronaldo's lads firing properly, but Croft will be quietly praying Uzbekistan pull off something mental to claw back ground — it won't happen, Croft, sit down.

England vs Ghana is the one to watch — Carter and Wilmot both need the points badly, but if England bottle it against Ghana, Wilmot will have Saudi Arabia and a face like a slapped arse to console himself with for the rest of the tournament.
